title: nasturtium latesiliqua
intro: Nasturtium latesiliqua, also known as the California pepper cress, is a type of flowering plant in the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its delicate, rounded leaves and bright yellow flowers. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The seeds and leaves of the nasturtium latesiliqua plant have been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions, due to their rich content of vitamins A, C, and E, as well as minerals like potassium and calcium. Nasturtium latesiliqua can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to promote healing and reduce inflammation in the body.
